cot_prefix: Okay, so the question is whether the sentence "Bastian Schweinsteiger scored in added time." is plausible. Let me break this down. First, I need to understand what this means. The sentence states that Bastian Schweinsteiger, a German professional footballer, scored a goal in "added time." Added time in football refers to the extra minutes added at the end of each half of a match by the referee to compensate for stoppages during play. So the question is whether it's plausible that Bastian Schweinsteiger has ever scored a goal in such added time during a match.
